prompt: A traditional Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print landscape featuring an anthropomorphic glass of beer with a frothy head, a happy smiling face, stick-like yellow arms and legs, and traditional sandals walking on a dirt path. The character holds a blue round fan displaying the kanji "涼". The background includes a large pine tree and a wooden bridge on the right with 3 small figures crossing, plus 3 more figures walking on the path. To the left, tall reeds border a river leading to a distant snow-capped Mount Fuji under a gradient sky. A traditional text cartouche in the top left reads "東海道 五十三次之内 由井" next to red artist seals, with a matching cartouche in the bottom left. The image has vintage, muted colors and authentic woodblock paper textures.
